title: Join the brave ones on 5 October in George
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The exciting inaugural TEDxGeorge, a gathering of the brightest local minds and innovators, is taking place on 5 October at the George Arts Theatre.

This event marks the beginning of an annual tradition where thinkers and doers converge to explore a wide array of topics, from technology and entertainment to science, humanities, business, and development.


> Themed “The Brave Ones,” this event celebrates locals who have continuously taken bold steps in their respective fields.


By providing a platform for them to share their stories, activities, and future aspirations, TEDxGeorge will inspire and empower others to reach their highest potential, despite challenges they may face.TED (Technology, Entertainment, Design) has become synonymous with ground-breaking ideas and inspirational talks.


> In the spirit of "ideas worth spreading", TEDxGeorge emerges as a local platform, part of the global TEDx programme, where individuals share transformative ideas.


Attendees will interact with sponsors and speakers while enjoying live demonstrations and a state-of-the-art car exhibit. The main aim is to create an interactive community that fosters deep discussions and connections. Not only will the talks entertain and inspire, but also provoke thought and encourage action to spark positive change in the community.


> Join TEDxGeorge on a journey of exploration at 09:00 on Saturday 5 October at the George Arts Theatre where speakers will delve into a range of topics, from language and artificial intelligence, to affordable healthcare, diversity, and much more. Info regarding ticket sales is available at www.tedxgeorge.com.


For more information about TEDxGeorge and how to get involved, visit their website or follow them on social media (@tedxgeorge) on Facebook and Instagram.

TED is a non-profit, nonpartisan organisation dedicated to discovering, debating, and spreading ideas that spark conversation, deepen understanding, and drive meaningful change.


> People from every discipline and culture who seek a deeper understanding of the world and connection with others are welcomed, and invited to engage with ideas that build communities.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
